title: grok-update.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for grok-update.yaml — defines scheduled smart update jobs that keep documentation, dependencies, and knowledge bases fresh. Compatible with grok-install.yaml@1.0+ and grok@2026.4+.

version.description: Semantic version of this update configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the update config owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with.

updates.description: Named update job definitions. Each key is the job identifier used in '@grok update <Name>' triggers.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this update job refreshes and why.

sources.description: File paths, directory globs, or URLs that this job reads and refreshes. Glob patterns are supported (e.g. 'docs/**/*.md').

frequency.description: How often this job runs automatically in the background.

auto_commit.description: Automatically commit changes produced by this job without human review. Use with caution.

require_approval.description: Open a PR for human review before merging changes. Takes precedence over auto_commit.

actions.description: Ordered list of named actions to perform on each source during the update run.

notify_on_change.description: Post an X notification when this job produces changes.

branch.description: Target branch for auto-committed or PR-based changes. Defaults to the repository default branch.

schedule_cron.description: Cron expression for precise scheduling. Overrides the frequency field when provided. Format: '0 9 * * 1' = every Monday at 09:00 UTC.

enabled.description: Whether this update job is active. Set to false to pause without removing the definition.
